title: Contacts connected board in CRM

posts.author: Daniel.prudente (DP)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
I’m currently facing an issue on my Deals board, specifically the connected column of the Contacts board in the Monday CRM.

They were all working fine, but any new Deal I add to my board, when I select my contact in the connected board column, it shows the contact, it also updates the mirrored column “Account”, but once I leave the board and come back or simply refresh the page, it disappears. I’ve tried to add multiple Deals, and disconnect and reconnect the Contacts column, it happens all the time for any new deal I create.

Does anyone have any idea?

Thanks

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml: can help resolve the issue with your Monday CRM where the connected column of the Contacts board is not retaining new Deals. This can be tackled by examining the integration settings between the Deals and Contacts boards, ensuring the mirrored columns are correctly synced. Additionally, I will check the permissions and refresh tokens to maintain a stable connection between these elements.

posts.author: lwatkins31 (Lee Watkins)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Daniel,

I would suggest raising a help desk ticket. It’s often useful to include a short video clip along with your request to illustrate the problem. You can use Loom or another form of screen recording to do this. Hope this helps!

Lee

posts.author: Daniel.prudente (DP)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks! It was solved yesterday. It was a bug from Monday side.
